testcase.name: test_01_create_message_success
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_messages.py:31: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: An email address must have an @-sign.","input":"4399","ctx":{"reason":"An email address must have an @-sign."}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
